stem: Which of the following is NOT one of the four general factors the chapter identifies for deciding when a client review is needed?

options.A: The size of the adviser's commission

explanation: 教材 1.4 列出的四类触发因素是:客户个人情况、外部发展、客户已购产品、产品发展。'顾问佣金的大小'不在其中。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.26 — s.1.4

stem: According to the chapter, when should a client review ideally take place in relation to a client's retirement or redundancy?

options.B: Just before the event actually takes place
options.C: Only when the client specifically requests it
options.D: Exactly on the date of the event

explanation: 教材 2.9 指出,理想情况下客户检视应在退休或裁员实际发生之前进行,以便做好充分准备实现平稳过渡。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.26 — s.2.9

stem: A client who values regular reviews asks for them to be done on his plans. What does the chapter advise the representative to do?

options.A: Decide the review frequency unilaterally based on product type
options.B: Review the plans only once every five years
options.C: Ask the client how often he wishes to review his financial plans
options.D: Refuse, as reviews are the client's own responsibility

explanation: 教材 2.13 指出,你应询问客户希望多久检视一次,这有助于与客户保持定期联系。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.26 — s.2.13

stem: Which of the following is given as an example of an 'external development' that may make a portfolio review appropriate?

options.A: The birth of the client's child
options.C: The client's decision to retire early
options.D: A change in CPF employees' or employers' contribution rates

explanation: 教材 3.2 把 CPF 缴费率的变化列为外部发展之一。子女出生、升职、提前退休均属客户个人情况(personal circumstances),非外部发展。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.26 — s.3.2

stem: A steep fall in equity prices is most directly a signal to review which clients' holdings?

options.A: Clients whose only product is a term life policy
options.B: Clients invested substantially in equities, including those whose ILP underlying fund invests substantially in equities
options.C: Clients who hold only annually renewable medical expense insurance
options.D: Clients with no investment products at all

explanation: 教材 3.3 指出,股价大幅下跌意味着需检视在股票上有大量投资的客户的现有投资与储蓄产品;对持有底层基金重仓股票的投连保单的客户同样适用。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.26 — s.3.3

stem: Why is the conversion option on a life insurance product highlighted as an important reason to review it?

options.A: Because converting always increases the sum assured automatically
options.B: Because conversion is compulsory at policy anniversary
options.C: Because it can usually be exercised by the client without the need for further evidence of health
options.D: Because conversion cancels the incontestability clause

explanation: 教材 4.4(a) 指出,人寿保险的转换选择权之所以重要,是因为客户通常无需进一步的健康证明即可行使。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.26 — s.4.4(a)

stem: For a life insurance product written under trust, what does the chapter say should be done?

options.A: Review the trust regularly to ensure its contents remain relevant, e.g. no change to the beneficiaries
options.B: Surrender the policy and re-purchase it every year
options.C: Convert the trust into an investment-linked policy
options.D: Remove the trust because it resets the waiting period

explanation: 教材 4.4(b) 指出,若人寿产品以信托形式订立,须定期检视信托以确保内容仍然相关,例如受益人是否有变。其余选项均无教材依据。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.26 — s.4.4(b)

stem: On what basis should an investment-linked product be reviewed to determine whether to advise the client to switch funds?

options.A: The adviser's personal market forecast only
options.B: A change in CPF contribution rates
options.C: The renewal notice of the client's medical insurance
options.D: The fund performance report and policy statement sent out to the client

explanation: 教材 4.6 指出,投连产品应根据寄送给客户的基金表现报告与保单结单来决定是否建议客户转换基金。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.26 — s.4.6

stem: Under normal circumstances, the chapter's stance on the replacement of insurance policies is that it should be:

options.A: Mandatory whenever a newer product is launched
options.B: Left entirely to the representative's discretion without any sign-off
options.C: Discouraged, with any replacement recommendation acknowledged and agreed by the FA representative's supervisor
options.D: Encouraged because it always benefits the client

explanation: 教材 5.6 指出,正常情况下应不鼓励替换保单;所有替换推荐应经 FA 代表的主管确认与同意,以降低不当销售风险。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.26 — s.5.6

stem: When an existing life policy is replaced by a new one, which combination correctly describes the effect on policy terms and benefits?

options.A: The incontestability clause, waiting period and suicide clause are re-set, and accumulated reversionary bonus is lost
options.B: Only the waiting period is re-set; all bonuses are carried over
options.C: Nothing is re-set because it is the same insurer
options.D: The suicide clause is removed permanently and bonuses are doubled

explanation: 教材 5.6 指出,替换会使新保单重置不可争议条款、等待期与自杀条款,同时被替换的保险将丧失索赔时点已累积的复归红利(reversionary bonus)。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.26 — s.5.6
